scope: Visible GitHub repositories owned by Eva plus local evidence artifacts available in the shared workspace.

repositories.available_reports: High: project reports exist for antibody ML, EGFR QSAR, GROMACS polymer/brucite models, Quantum ESPRESSO calculations, and DFT/conformer work.
repositories.available_figures: High: antibody benchmark figures, EGFR QSAR figures, MD visual checks, and DFT/materials figures are present.
repositories.available_metrics: High for antibody ML and EGFR QSAR; medium for MD/materials where tables and analysis summaries exist.
repositories.available_notebooks: EGFR QSAR notebooks and thesis/project notebooks are present; antibody and MD recruiter notebooks were missing before this branch.
repositories.reproducibility_status: Partial. Scripts, requirements, reports, and cached outputs exist; full reproduction may require raw datasets, model weights, large trajectories, or HPC resources.
repositories.claims_supported: Supported only when tied to committed reports, metrics JSON/CSV files, figures, notebooks, or scripts. Raw/private and heavy artifacts require curated public summaries.
missing_assets: Sanitized recruiter notebooks for antibody and MD

portfolio_projects.title: Antibody sequence ML and existing-record prioritization
supported_claims: Public CoV-AbDab-derived workflow for retrospective antibody sequence benchmarking.
Strict labeled dataset and broader prepared-record set are available as committed processed artifacts.

Grouped validation, source-holdout validation, source-robust model selection, calibration/threshold analysis, k-mer TF-IDF baselines, antibody embedding/model benchmarks, CDR annotation, OAS background retrieval, and diversity-aware existing-record prioritization are evidenced by committed reports and metrics.
Final selected model is whole_pair_kmer, a whole-pair k-mer TF-IDF logistic-regression scorer.
Grouped validation reached ROC-AUC 0.7800 and PR-AUC 0.8233; source-robust weighted validation reached ROC-AUC 0.6095 and PR-AUC 0.6363.
Final consistency audit is PASS and test suite reports 8 passed.

Sparse k-mer/CDR-local features were more robust than pretrained antibody language-model representations in the matched/noisy public-label benchmark context, but the final broad scorer remains whole-pair k-mer.

portfolio_projects.title: EGFR QSAR / CADD benchmark
supported_claims: ChEMBL EGFR IC50 data curation workflow using RDKit descriptors and Morgan fingerprints.
Random split and Bemis-Murcko scaffold split evaluations are present.
Random split Morgan random forest RMSE 0.712 / R2 0.719 and scaffold split Morgan random forest RMSE 0.871 / R2 0.550 are supported by committed metrics.
Performance drop under scaffold split is appropriate evidence for leakage-aware validation framing.

portfolio_projects.title: Polymer-filler MD and flame-retardant molecular modeling
supported_claims: Polypropylene/brucite interface simulations and coated versus uncoated filler-surface analyses are present.
Atomistic/coarse-grained GROMACS workflows, contact analysis, interaction-energy summaries, and density/profile outputs are present.
Surface coating reduced direct PP-brucite contact and shifted interactions toward the stearic-acid layer in the available analysis tables.
DFT/conformer flame-retardant candidate assets and periodic DFT utilities support secondary materials modeling positioning.

portfolio_projects.title: Reaction Yield Prediction and Synthesis-Aware ML
supported_claims: Public Buchwald-Hartwig HTE reaction-yield benchmark with documented source, citation, and access notes.

Aggregate-only data audit, reaction cleaning, component one-hot featurization, target-leakage checks, random and out-of-component validation, model benchmarking, uncertainty calibration, active-learning simulation, existing-record ranking, and interpretability reports are evidenced by committed reports and metrics.
Final selected model is random_forest, selected on the grouped high-cardinality component split rather than only random split performance.
Primary split metrics are MAE 10.7537, RMSE 14.2371, R2 0.7262, Spearman 0.8597, and top-10% enrichment 7.3333.
Primary split empirical 90% interval coverage is 0.7978.
Final quality gate is PASS and pytest reports 8 passed.
